description_long: This object is a roughly rectangular stone block with a weathered, uneven surface and a distinct decorative floral carving running horizontally across one face. The block appears to be made of a light-colored stone, possibly limestone or sandstone, with visible chipping and irregularities along its edges. The carved side features a band of stylized flowers and leaves, suggesting it may have served a decorative or architectural function. The reverse side is rough and unadorned, showing natural stone texture and some discoloration. The block is relatively thin compared to its height and width, and the top and bottom edges are jagged, indicating it may be a fragment of a larger structure. Its overall appearance suggests historical or ornamental use in an urban or garden setting.
description: A light-colored, weathered stone block with a floral carving on one face and rough, chipped edges. The block is thin and rectangular, likely a decorative architectural fragment.
description_view_0: The block is seen from an angle highlighting its rough, jagged edge and the thinness of its profile, with minimal detail visible on the main face.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the unadorned, natural stone surface and the irregular, chipped top and side edges.
description_view_2: The carved floral band is clearly visible, showing detailed ornamentation and the smoother, worked face of the block.
description_view_3: A close view of the decorative face, with the floral carving and horizontal bands most prominent, and the block's thickness and rough top edge apparent.
attribute_location_context: historic garden wall or decorative urban park feature
attribute_installation_method: dry-stacked or mortared into a wall
attribute_weathering_pattern: Chipped corners and edges with some surface discoloration, indicating exposure to the elements and age.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Visible floral carvings and decorative bands on one face.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: Forms part of a continuous wall or decorative border.
